repo_signals: L3 smoke for code.os-kernel: Linux device driver with ioctl, syscall implementation, copy_from_user validation, page table and virtual memory, scheduler class, spinlock vs mutex in interrupt context
style a mobile app onboarding screen with animations and gradients

retrieval_query: kernel module syscall device driver ioctl page table virtual memory scheduler spinlock mutex interrupt handler copy_from_user user space privilege paging

validation_smoke.name: code.os-kernel L3 validation smoke
signals: copy_from_user / copy_to_user return checked and pointers validated
lockdep reports no deadlock or inversion under stress
kmemleak / KASAN clean across the test workload
fault injection (ENOMEM, EFAULT) handled without panic

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.os-kernel diagnosis smoke
signals: user pointer dereferenced directly instead of via copy_from_user
sleeping allocation or mutex taken while holding a spinlock
reference count or allocation leaked on an error path
missing bounds check on an ioctl argument size
interrupt handler doing long work or taking a sleeping lock
